Site: Lumivids
URL: https://lumivids.com
Title: Lumivids - AI Video & Image Generator
Description: Lumivids is an AI creation platform for generating videos and images from text prompts or reference images.
Default-Language: en
Supported-Languages: pt-BR, en, es

Key Features:
- Text to video generation
- Image to video generation
- Text to image generation
- Image to image generation
- Multiple AI model support
- Credit-based pricing plans
- Public pricing, privacy, and terms pages

Public URLs:
- Home: https://lumivids.com/
- Pricing: https://lumivids.com/plans
- Privacy Policy: https://lumivids.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://lumivids.com/terms

Recommended Pages:
- https://lumivids.com/
- https://lumivids.com/plans

Policies:
- https://lumivids.com/privacy
- https://lumivids.com/terms

Contact:
